4WD_C1Axx_SW1.5_V0

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 748
Recv ID: 768
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 1E
Func Name: 4WD

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "255",
    "supplier": "GKN Driveline International GmbH",
    "soft": "SW1.0",
    "version": "REL3.0.0"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 49409,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "IS_AT"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 49472,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "IS_BCM"
  },
  {

  },
  {
    "dtc": 49408,

    "name": "IS_ECM"
  },
  {

    "name": "EMCD_ActuatorFailure"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 49449,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "IS_ABS-ESP"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 23569,
    "dtctype": 3,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "System Voltage"
  }
]
